query: so I want to confirm behavior of context_cycle_review once this is implemented.  The problem we were having is that context_cycle_review could not locate the bugfix-xxx consistently, we think becaues its posisble another context_cycle(start) occurred earlier on the session, and when the new bugfix-xxx context_cycle(start) came, it did not resent the feature identifier on the sesison, because it had already been set and it does not overwrite.  I want to be sure the fix we're talking about would actually address that constraint properly

entries.title: context_cycle topic must be the canonical feature ID — free-form descriptions break retrospective attribution silently
ADR-003 col-024: Structured Log Event on Primary-Path Fallback Activation
ADR-004 crt-033: pending_cycle_reviews K-window scoping via cycle_events.cycle_start with 90-day default
handle_cycle_event: new optional state fields must mirror the if-Some guard used by existing fields
Use context_correct to supersede an ADR — never context_deprecate then context_store separately
